title: Brazil Achieves a Significant Feat Not Seen Since 2018
section_path: Brazil Achieves a Significant Feat Not Seen Since 2018
section_path_text: Brazil Achieves a Significant Feat Not Seen Since 2018
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Brazilian iron ore exports totaled approximately 24.1 million tons last month, which marks a month-on-month decline of 4.9 million tons (-17%) but a year-on-year increase of 2 million tons (9%). It is normal for Brazilian iron ore exports to decline on a month-on-month basis in February. This has occurred during each of the last five years.
